title: Garlic Wild Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry recipe featuring wild mushrooms, garlic, and silky korean chili flakes. Serve over a bed of fresh leaves.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the wild mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the silky korean chili flakes and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the mushroom mixture over a bed of chopped leaves in a bowl.
Garnish with additional leaves if desired.
